id.description: Stable identifier for this portable OACS record.

name.description: Human-readable stable name for the manifest or binding.

scope.description: Portable scope labels that constrain where the record applies.

namespace.description: Logical namespace used to separate records without requiring a specific storage backend.

priority.description: Ordering priority used by policy engines without requiring a specific runtime.

rule_kind.description: Portable rule_kind field for the RuleManifest record.

content.description: Portable rule text or structured rule body; runtime enforcement remains adapter-specific.

applies_to.description: Portable target selectors that describe where a rule applies.

enforcement_mode.description: Portable enforcement_mode field for the RuleManifest record.

blocking.description: Whether this rule can block an operation under policy.

evidence_refs.description: EvidenceRef identifiers that support this record without embedding evidence payloads.

status.description: Lifecycle status for this record in the portable OACS model.

owner_actor_id.description: Optional actor identifier for ownership or accountability metadata.

created_at.description: Creation timestamp encoded as a portable string.

updated_at.description: Last update timestamp encoded as a portable string.

content_hash.description: Canonical content hash used for integrity checks across implementations.
